name_cn:
【Black Gold Buckle】
LouLou_ Large
A large bag you'll fall in love with at first glance!!️ Lightweight and spacious. Imported Italian fine calfskin, flip-top magnetic snap design is convenient and secure. A must-have for daily commute and leisure for all the Kendalls~ A timeless piece, hurry and get this unisex bag. Casual and commuter-friendly, large capacity yet lightweight!
Style No.: 574947
Size: 36×27×14cm
